_doc: Slot funnel for paper cards / plant stakes / message cards.

slots.intent: Card in destination — plant pot, desk, vase

LOCKED (RULE-016): Combined features + size infographic — header banner with category icon + product with dimension arrows (width, height, thickness callout bubble) + N numbered callout cards (rounded squares, macro + 2-line label) for material, waterproofing, customization, longevity

LOCKED (RULE-017): N-cell display-locations grid (default 2×2, adaptive 2-4 cells) — for cards the cells show envelope / desk / frame / pinboard or similar niche-appropriate display scenarios; safeguard: exactly N cells, no fifth floating product
